name: SOHM, Inc.
summary: SOHM, Inc. develops, manufactures, markets, and distributes generic and private label pharmaceutical products in the United States. It offers analgesics, antibiotics, anti-cold, and anti-inflammatory drugs, as well as over-the-counter, cosmeceuticals, and nutraceutical products. The company also exports its products. SOHM, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is based in Corona, California.
